{ "name": "nikic/php-parser", "type": "library", "description": "A PHP parser written in PHP", "keywords": [ "php", "parser" ], "license": "BSD-3-Clause", "authors": [ { "name": "Nikita Popov" } ], "require": { "php": ">=7.4", "ext-tokenizer": "*", "ext-json": "*", "ext-ctype": "*" }, "require-dev": { "phpunit/phpunit": "^9.0", "ircmaxell/php-yacc": "^0.0.7" }, "extra": { "branch-alias": { "dev-master": "5.x-dev" } }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "PhpParser\\": "lib/PhpParser" } }, "autoload-dev": { "psr-4": { "PhpParser\\": "test/PhpParser/" } }, "bin": [ "bin/php-parse" ] }
